home.title: The "Lost Item" Is Not Your Memory Failing...
home.subtitle: It's "Inattentional Blindness" — Your Brain's Cognitive Blind Spot
home.description: CogniSeek uses behavioral psychology, environmental probability, and temporal tracing to help you rediscover lost items in 3 minutes.
home.tagline: Powered by AI · Based on Cognitive Science

card1.desc: Reconstructing the moment of unconscious placement

result.subtitle: Based on 15,000+ success cases

result.ctaButton: Get Blind Spot Coordinates & Reverse Search Tactics
result.urgency: Distance from memory golden recovery window: only {time} left

tunnelVision.title: Tunnel Vision Effect
tunnelVision.content: High-stress state detected. Your brain automatically filtered out visual signals from non-habitual locations. You didn't fail to see it — your brain "edited it out" of the image.

camouflage.title: Camouflage Warning (Visual Mimicry)
camouflage.content: The item's color is causing spectral fusion with the environment. Simply put, it blends in — becoming "camouflage." Under current lighting, human eye detection rate drops to 15%. A reverse visual scan is required.

memoryDeception.title: Memory Deception Effect
memoryDeception.content: In autopilot mode, the memory system experienced a "temporal displacement." The item is often not where you "remember" placing it, but at the exact moment your action was interrupted.

primary.title: Primary Suspect Zone: Gravity Sink Point
primary.hint: The 90% probability zone following physics laws — easily overlooked...

secondary.title: Secondary Suspect Zone: Visual Blind Spot
secondary.hint: Located in habitual dead angles below eye level...

auxiliary.title: Auxiliary Zone: Social Transfer Point
auxiliary.hint: Locations where others may have unconsciously moved it...

report.title: Recovery Index
report.subtitle: AI Tactical Analysis Report
report.unlockDesc: 5 micro-tactic precision commands + exact coordinate decryption
report.encouragement: Execute the tactical actions above carefully. If still not found, download the full report to share and seek help.
report.basicSearchDesc: Based on common sense, you've likely already checked:
report.aiDisclaimer: * AI provides probability-based clues only and does not guarantee 100% recovery.
report.imageGenFailed: Image generation failed. Use Print to save as PDF?
report.predictionsLockedDesc: Unlock to view exact locations & search techniques

lightInsights.dawn_morning: ☀️ AI Analysis: Morning light is clear and cool. If the item is in an open area, it should be relatively easy to spot.
lightInsights.noon_afternoon: ☀️ AI Analysis: Strong light can create shadows. Check the shaded sides of objects and areas in shadow.
lightInsights.dusk: 🌇 AI Analysis: Rapidly changing light reduces eye adaptation. Items easily slip into visual blind spots — focus on transition areas.
lightInsights.night: 🌑 AI Analysis: Low visibility. If lights were off, check floor-level gaps, under furniture, and low corners.

home.heroSubtitle: CogniSeek uses behavioral psychology, space-time reconstruction, and AI cognition to pinpoint your item's most likely location in minutes.
home.featuresSubtitle: Six-dimensional analysis combining psychology, physics, and AI to trace what your memory missed.

psychology.title: Behavioral Psychology
psychology.desc: Analyzes your mental state and action habits to reconstruct unconscious behaviors during the loss event.

spatial.title: Spatial Probability
spatial.desc: Maps your movement path and calculates probability distributions for each area using spatial algorithms.

temporal.title: Time-Space Reconstruction
temporal.desc: Rebuilds the temporal window of the loss using memory entropy and multi-dimensional time cues.

vision.title: Visual Blind Spot Analysis
vision.desc: Detects cognitive visual blind spots that cause people to look right at an object without seeing it.

entropy.title: Chaos Entropy Engine
entropy.desc: Quantifies the degree of disorder in your state and environment to prioritize search zones.

instant.title: Instant AI Report
instant.desc: Generates a personalized tactical search plan in seconds, with step-by-step micro-action guidance.

home.howSubtitle: Complete 6 steps in under 3 minutes for a precision AI analysis.

1.title: Describe the Item
1.desc: Tell us what you lost — type, color, and features.

2.title: Set the Timeline
2.desc: When did you last have it? Lock the time window.

3.title: Map the Location
3.desc: Pinpoint where you were and the areas you visited.

4.title: Recall Your State
4.desc: Describe your mood and activities at the time.

5.title: Report Prior Searches
5.desc: Tell us where you've already looked — and haven't.

6.title: Get Your AI Report
6.desc: Receive a precision recovery plan with tactical actions.

1.text: I searched everywhere for 40 minutes. CogniSeek pointed me to the seat rail gap I'd never think to check — found my AirPods in 2 minutes.
1.name: Alex R.

2.text: The psychological analysis was uncanny. It knew I was rushed and suggested the jacket pocket I threw on a chair. There it was.
2.name: Sarah M.

3.text: My cat went missing. The spatial probability map highlighted the exact closet corner. Opened it and she was there.
3.name: Jordan L.

home.ctaBannerSubtitle: Let AI reconstruct the moment and tell you exactly where to look.

footer.disclaimer: CogniSeek provides probability-based guidance and does not guarantee recovery. For entertainment and cognitive assistance purposes.
